_comment: Stub LLM response fixture — simulates a high-confidence proceed decision from 04_decide.rl.
_usage: Used by tests that assert the pipeline proceeds when confidence is high and all constraints are clear.

attributes.reasoning_summary: High confidence in primary action. Subject is priority category with complete data and all operational limits clear.

goals_resolved: evaluate PrimaryAction for Decision with confidence threshold 0.65
determine final Decision as one of: proceed, defer, escalate, skip
assign confidence_score to Decision between 0.0 and 1.0
assign reasoning_summary to Decision in plain text
annotate Decision with dry_run_active from BotState configuration

raw_llm_text:
The subject has been analysed with high confidence. All signals are consistent, operational limits are clear, and the subject falls into the priority category with a score above threshold. Proceeding with the primary action.

Decision has action of "proceed".
Decision has confidence_score of 0.91.
Decision has reasoning_summary of "High confidence in primary action. Subject is priority category with complete data and all operational limits clear.".
Decision has dry_run_active of "true".
